cases.sql:
WITH foo AS (
              SELECT
                1 AS a
            ), bar AS (
              (
                SELECT
                  a + 1 AS a
                FROM foo
              )
            )
            (
              SELECT
                a + b AS a
              FROM bar
              CROSS JOIN (
                SELECT
                  2 AS b
              ) AS baz
            )

expected.name: a
expected.source: WITH foo AS (SELECT 1 AS a), bar AS ((SELECT foo.a + 1 AS a FROM foo AS foo)) SELECT bar.a + baz.b AS a FROM bar AS bar CROSS JOIN (SELECT 2 AS b) AS baz

downstream.name: bar.a
downstream.source: SELECT foo.a + 1 AS a FROM foo AS foo

cases.sql:
WITH three_way AS (
            SELECT a FROM t1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT a FROM t2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT a FROM t3
        ),
        attached AS (
            SELECT COALESCE(r1.a, r2.a) AS a
            FROM three_way AS r1
            LEFT JOIN three_way AS r2 ON r1.a = r2.a
        )
        SELECT a FROM attached

expected.name: a
expected.source: WITH three_way AS (SELECT t1.a AS a FROM t1 AS t1 UNION ALL SELECT t2.a AS a FROM t2 AS t2 UNION ALL SELECT t3.a AS a FROM t3 AS t3), attached AS (SELECT COALESCE(r1.a, r2.a) AS a FROM three_way AS r1 LEFT JOIN three_way AS r2 ON r1.a = r2.a) SELECT attached.a AS a FROM attached AS attached

downstream.name: attached.a
downstream.source: SELECT COALESCE(r1.a, r2.a) AS a FROM three_way AS r1 LEFT JOIN three_way AS r2 ON r1.a = r2.a

SELECT t2.a AS a FROM t2 AS t2

SELECT t3.a AS a FROM t3 AS t3
SELECT t3.a AS a FROM t3 AS t3

cases.sql:
WITH cte AS (
            SELECT * FROM (
                SELECT product_type, month, loan_id
                FROM loan_ledger
            ) PIVOT (
                COUNT(loan_id) FOR month IN ('2024-10', '2024-11')
            )
        )
        SELECT
            cte.product_type AS product_type,
            cte."2024-10" AS "2024-10"
        FROM cte

expected.name: product_type
expected.source: WITH cte AS (SELECT _1.product_type AS product_type, _1."2024-10" AS "2024-10", _1."2024-11" AS "2024-11" FROM (SELECT loan_ledger.product_type AS product_type, loan_ledger.month AS month, loan_ledger.loan_id AS loan_id FROM loan_ledger AS loan_ledger) AS _0 PIVOT(COUNT(loan_id) FOR month IN ('2024-10', '2024-11')) AS _1) SELECT cte.product_type AS product_type FROM cte AS cte

downstream.name: cte.product_type
downstream.source: SELECT _1.product_type AS product_type FROM (SELECT loan_ledger.product_type AS product_type, loan_ledger.month AS month, loan_ledger.loan_id AS loan_id FROM loan_ledger AS loan_ledger) AS _0 PIVOT(COUNT(loan_id) FOR month IN ('2024-10', '2024-11')) AS _1

downstream.name: _0.product_type
downstream.source: SELECT loan_ledger.product_type AS product_type FROM loan_ledger AS loan_ledger
